bullets.conclusion: See r4_p1_forward_by_mark.csv; Mark-conditioned fwd mids vary by role/K; many cells low-n.
r4_p1_mark_product_cross.csv: same-symbol vs extract vs hydro fwd at print time by Mark×role×product×K×spread regime with bootstrap 95% CI on mean.
r4_p1_mark_burst_same_sym.csv stratifies same-symbol fwd when (day,ts) has ≥4 trades vs isolated prints.
Per (buyer,seller,symbol) mean fwd20 and trade-level residuals in r4_p1_pair_baseline_residuals.csv.
Mark 01→Mark 22 dominates edge list (r4_p1_graph_edges.csv); 2-hop chain enumeration r4_p1_2hop_motifs.csv.
Multi-symbol same-ts bursts listed; vs random-time extract fwd20 compare in summary.
Proxy: aggressive-side fwd on same symbol; detailed in forward_by_mark for buyer_agg vs seller_agg.

top_5_tradeable_edges.hypothesis: Mark 01→Mark 22 directed flow is the dominant graph edge (basket/scheduler, not a one-off pair).
Multi-symbol same-timestamp bursts (≥4 rows) shift extract forward-20 more than time-matched random controls.
top_5_tradeable_edges.effect: mean extract fwd20 after burst prints 0.3345 vs control 0.0710; 293 burst rows (summary + r4_p1_burst_events.csv)

top_5_tradeable_edges.hypothesis: Mark 67 aggressive buys: large positive same-symbol short-horizon forwards (isolated prints; n in hundreds).
top_5_tradeable_edges.effect: buyer_agg isolated K5 mean≈+1.98 (t≈13.0) n=162; K20 mean≈+1.82 (t≈5.8) n=162 (r4_p1_mark_burst_same_sym.csv; summary)

top_5_tradeable_edges.hypothesis: Mark 22 seller_agg on multi-ts bursts: negative short-horizon same-symbol fwd (adverse to liquidity at touch on core/wing mass).
top_5_tradeable_edges.effect: K5 mean≈-0.043 (t≈-4.04) n=1344 multi_ts_burst (r4_p1_mark_burst_same_sym.csv); M22×VEV_5300 rows n=160 at K5 in mark_product_cross

top_5_tradeable_edges.hypothesis: Mark 55 buyer_agg isolated: positive K5/K20 same-symbol mean forwards with n≈590+.
top_5_tradeable_edges.effect: isolated K5 mean≈+0.20 (t≈2.25) n=591; K20 mean≈+0.40 (t≈2.42) n=591 (r4_p1_mark_burst_same_sym.csv)

negative_results: Mark 38 burst stratum: n=16–18 per subcell in r4_p1_mark_burst_same_sym.csv — not enough for stand-alone edge claims despite large point estimates.
Mark 22 seller_agg on VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT as traded_symbol: n=11 in r4_p1_mark_product_cross.csv — strong point estimates but too few prints for a sizing rule.
Sparse tape vs dense BBO: 4281 trade rows vs ~1e5 price updates — many forward joins are per-print only; day-stability must be checked in Phase 3 tables.
Sim ablations (v4 global clip 28, v8 wing 20, v9–v10 extract/hydro clips, v11 core 24): joint-gate MM total often unchanged — per-side clip not binding in this backtester for those ranges.
